raw_note_text: Synthetic operator note for testing only. Ground was riding on the easy side after overnight rain; the stands' side looked to hold the better ground in the previous race. A few first-time-out juveniles in the field, so the early market may move. This is our own short observation, not a copied article.

notes.text: Ground easy after overnight rain; watch for it drying through the card.
Likely strong early pace; prominent racers may be vulnerable late.
Stands' side appeared to hold the better ground earlier.

notes: Several unraced/first-time-out juveniles in the field — market may be volatile.
